artifacts_scope_target_check.name: artifacts_scope_target_check
artifacts_scope_target_check.value: ("artifacts"."scope_type"::text = 'company' AND "artifacts"."task_id" IS NULL AND "artifacts"."session_id" IS NULL) OR ("artifacts"."scope_type"::text = 'task' AND "artifacts"."task_id" IS NOT NULL AND "artifacts"."session_id" IS NULL) OR ("artifacts"."scope_type"::text = 'session' AND "artifacts"."task_id" IS NULL AND "artifacts"."session_id" IS NOT NULL)

skills_file_backed_source_check.name: skills_file_backed_source_check
skills_file_backed_source_check.value:
coalesce(cardinality("skills"."file_list"), 0) = 0 OR (
      nullif(trim("skills"."repository"), '') IS NOT NULL
      AND nullif(trim("skills"."skill_directory"), '') IS NOT NULL
      AND nullif(trim("skills"."github_tracked_commit_sha"), '') IS NOT NULL
    )
